name: getPDF
description: Generate a print-ready A4 PDF and matching HTML file from HTML input. CSS is REQUIRED. Accepts structured fields or a free-form raw string. Saves both to disk and returns public URLs for the PDF and HTML. Always show both the pdf URL and the html URL in the response. IMPORTANT: Any images to be included in the PDF must be generated first (e.g. via getImage) before calling this tool.

html.description: HTML content (full document or body fragment). May include <style> blocks; they will be extracted into css.

css.description: REQUIRED CSS to apply. Provide here or embedded in HTML via <style> blocks.

title.description: Optional document title used in the HTML <title> element.

filename.description: Optional base filename without extension. Normalized automatically.

raw.description: Alternative free-form input: fenced code blocks (```json, ```html, ```css), full HTML documents, or unterminated JSON strings.
